channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US soldier killed in Iraq was a 30-year-old father from North Carolina
item.description: The U.S. military has identified a soldier killed while disarming an Iranian drone in Iraq as Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton from North Carolina.

item.title: Arizona Republicans pick nominees Tuesday for governor and other top offices
Tropical Storm Bertha is expected to bring heavy rain, flooding along the Gulf Coast
